title: Xtra Special Thai Cabbage Salad
description: A refreshing and crunchy salad made with napa cabbage, yum dressing, and a variety of ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shredded napa cabbage and mixed greens.
In a small bowl, whisk together the yum dressing and chopped cilantro.
Add the diced mango to the bowl with the cabbage and toss to combine.
Drizzle the yum dressing mixture over the salad and toss to coat.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
